description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs for different environments and compilers, including Ubuntu with gcc-8, gcc-9, clang-6, and clang-9, and MacOS with gcc-9 and clang. For each job, check out the code, display compiler information, compile the library and tests, run unit tests and examples, and optionally upload code coverage to Codecov.
